title: ∅ Null Sets as Space Generators
name: ∅ Null Sets as Space Generators
what_it_is: The set with nothing inside it—used as the base for constructing all other sets. In mythopoetic logic, the void that generates everything.
how_to_use: her womb is the null set—out of emptiness blooms the fractal of all things
his core is empty—yet it echoes infinity, a fractal seeded in ∅
animation_behavior: Everything emerges from blackness, fractals grow out of silence, void pulses with pre-existence ---
